word: 激光嘅物理學可能好複雜，但係，呢個只係一個電子點樣同光相互…
translation: The physics of the laser may be complex. Still, it is just a story of how electrons interact with light. When a light particle, or photon, hits an electron, the electron jumps to a higher energy state. If another photon strikes one of these high-energy electrons, the electron releases two photons that travel together at the same wavelength. When this process is repeated enough, lots of organized, or coherent, photons are produced.
example: 激光嘅物理學可能好複雜，但係，呢個只係一個電子點樣同光相互作用嘅故事，當一個光粒子撞到一個電子，如果另一個光子撞到其中一個 高能量電子，電子會釋放兩個以相同波長行駛埋一齊嘅光子，當呢個過程重複得多，就會產生好多有組織或者相干嘅光子。
exampleTranslation: The physics of the laser may be complex. Still, it is just a story of how electrons interact with light. When a light particle, or photon, hits an electron, the electron jumps to a higher energy state. If another photon strikes one of these high-energy electrons, the electron releases two photons that travel together at the same wavelength. When this process is repeated enough, lots of organized, or coherent, photons are produced.

word: Cris 喺我部高清電視度發出嘅評論令我諗起「你一定要喺度…
translation: Cris’ comment coming through my high definition tv made me think if it was still true that “you had to be there.” Comparing what I saw in “real definition,” I can attest watching on modern television is in many ways better. The close up perspectives, sweeping panoramic shots, super slow motion replays all display the action as you could never see it from a stadium seat or standing on the sidelines.
example: Cris 喺我部高清電視度發出嘅評論令我諗起「你一定要喺度」係咪仲係真嘅。 比較我喺「真正定義」入面睇到嘅嘢，我可以證明睇現代電視喺好多方面都係好啲。 特寫視角、全景鏡頭、超慢動作重播都顯示出動作，因為你喺球場座位或者企喺場邊永遠都唔會睇到。
exampleTranslation: Cris’ comment coming through my high definition tv made me think if it was still true that “you had to be there.” Comparing what I saw in “real definition,” I can attest watching on modern television is in many ways better. The close up perspectives, sweeping panoramic shots, super slow motion replays all display the action as you could never see it from a stadium seat or standing on the sidelines.

word: 當你個仔聽日問你，話：呢個係乜嘢嚟嘅？你要回答佢：主用有力…
translation: And when thy son shall ask thee to morrow, saying: What is this? thou shalt answer him: With a strong hand did the Lord bring us forth out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage. For when Pharaoh was hardened, and would not let us go, the Lord slew every firstborn in the land of Egypt, from the firstborn of man to the firstborn of beasts: therefore I sacrifice to the Lord all that openeth the womb of the male sex, and all the firstborn of my sons I redeem.
example: 當你個仔聽日問你，話：呢個係乜嘢嚟嘅？你要回答佢：主用有力嘅手，將我哋從埃及地，由奴役之家帶出嚟。因為當法老硬化，唔肯放我哋走嘅時候，耶和華就殺死埃及地嘅每一個長子，由人嘅長子到獸嘅長子：所以我將所有打開男性子宮嘅，同埋我救贖嘅所有長子，都獻給主。
exampleTranslation: And when thy son shall ask thee to morrow, saying: What is this? thou shalt answer him: With a strong hand did the Lord bring us forth out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage. For when Pharaoh was hardened, and would not let us go, the Lord slew every firstborn in the land of Egypt, from the firstborn of man to the firstborn of beasts: therefore I sacrifice to the Lord all that openeth the womb of the male sex, and all the firstborn of my sons I redeem.

word: 終於，我已經到咗77歲。老化嘅健康問題自然已經開始喺呢度同…
translation: Finally, I've made it to 77. The health issues of aging have naturally begun to appear here and there, but so far, it's nothing too serious. The biggest issue is the rapid onset of my forgetfulness. It's like gaining a talent for forgetting, or that's how I see it. From now on, I'm only going to focus on enjoyable, desirable activities and I'll avoid using words like "endurance" or "perseverance" either towards others or myself.
example: 終於，我已經到咗77歲。老化嘅健康問題自然已經開始喺呢度同嗰度出現，但係到目前為止，呢個並唔係太嚴重，最大嘅問題係我嘅健忘能力迅速出現，或者我會噉睇，由而家開始，我只會專注於享受或者「我想要嘅嘢」呢啲字眼 我自己。
exampleTranslation: Finally, I've made it to 77. The health issues of aging have naturally begun to appear here and there, but so far, it's nothing too serious. The biggest issue is the rapid onset of my forgetfulness. It's like gaining a talent for forgetting, or that's how I see it. From now on, I'm only going to focus on enjoyable, desirable activities and I'll avoid using words like "endurance" or "perseverance" either towards others or myself.

"Yes, my love." "And the bathroom?" "I had no time for..." "Do it now then, while I eat with the kids. Hurry up!"

exampleTranslation: "...and that's why it's not OK to be gay, kids." "What are you teaching the kids?" "Nothing, my love. I cooked you and the kids dinner." word: 喺城市入面，富裕階級嘅居所唔係好似我哋咁明確，雖然對愉快嘅…
translation: In the cities the quarters for the wealthier classes are not so sharply defined as with us, though the love for pleasant outlooks and beautiful scenery tends to enhance the value of certain districts, and consequently to bring together the wealthier classes. In nearly all the cities, however, you will find the houses of the wealthy in the immediate vicinity of the habitations of the poorest. In Tokio one may find streets, or narrow alleys, lined with a continuous row of the cheapest shelters; and here dwell the poorest people. Though squalid and dirty as such places appear to the Japanese, they are immaculate in comparison with the unutterable filth and misery of similar quarters in nearly all the great cities of Christendom. Certainly a rich man in Japan would not, as a general thing, buy up the land about his house to keep the poorer classes at a distance, for the reason that their presence would not be objectionable, since poverty in Japan is not associated with the impossible manners of a similar class at home.
example: 喺城市入面，富裕階級嘅居所唔係好似我哋咁明確，雖然對愉快嘅景色同美麗風景嘅熱愛傾向於提升某啲區域嘅價值，從而將富裕階級聚集埋一齊。但係，喺幾乎所有城市，你都會喺最窮嘅人嘅住所附近搵到有錢人嘅屋。喺東京，你可能會發現街道，或者窄啲嘅巷仔，排咗一排最平嘅避難所；呢度住住最窮嘅人。雖然呢啲地方對日本人嚟講係污糟同污糟嘅，但係同基督教世界幾乎所有大城市嘅類似地方嘅無法言說嘅污穢同悲劇相比，佢哋係完美無瑕嘅。當然，日本嘅有錢人唔會，一般嚟講，買起佢屋企附近嘅土地，嚟同較窮嘅階級保持距離，因為佢哋嘅存在唔會令人反感，因為日本嘅貧窮同國內類似階級嘅無可能嘅禮儀無關。
exampleTranslation: In the cities the quarters for the wealthier classes are not so sharply defined as with us, though the love for pleasant outlooks and beautiful scenery tends to enhance the value of certain districts, and consequently to bring together the wealthier classes. In nearly all the cities, however, you will find the houses of the wealthy in the immediate vicinity of the habitations of the poorest. In Tokio one may find streets, or narrow alleys, lined with a continuous row of the cheapest shelters; and here dwell the poorest people. Though squalid and dirty as such places appear to the Japanese, they are immaculate in comparison with the unutterable filth and misery of similar quarters in nearly all the great cities of Christendom. Certainly a rich man in Japan would not, as a general thing, buy up the land about his house to keep the poorer classes at a distance, for the reason that their presence would not be objectionable, since poverty in Japan is not associated with the impossible manners of a similar class at home.

exampleTranslation: Before battle was joined they say that someone from Trachis warned him how many Persians there were by saying that when they fired their bows, they hid the sun with the mass of arrows. Dianeces, so the story goes, was so dismissive of the Persian numbers that he calmly replied, "All to the good, my friend from Trachis. If the Persians hide the sun, the battle will be in shade rather than sunlight."

Homebound, I saw on the sidewalk an Oriental boy squatting, wearing orange and yellow. He got up and walked away. Some landscapers were at a yard. There was an orange-vested handsome labourer fiddling with his machine tool by his vehicle. For lunch and dinner at home, it seemed special with steamed tofu and fish on rice.

Homebound, I saw on the sidewalk an Oriental boy squatting, wearing orange and yellow. He got up and walked away. Some landscapers were at a yard. There was an orange-vested handsome labourer fiddling with his machine tool by his vehicle. For lunch and dinner at home, it seemed special with steamed tofu and fish on rice.

translation: Before pouring cement mixture into forms for a foundation, the work crew securely place an armature of steel bars at a predetermined spacing in order to reinforce the finished building's hardened concrete. If a piece of steel is not long enough to span the required distance, the workers will overlap two pieces and tie them together to form a strong splice.

word: 而家已經有四十四個美國人宣誓咗總統。呢啲說話係喺繁榮嘅潮汐…
translation: Forty-four US Americans have now taken the presidential oath. The words have been spoken during rising tides of prosperity and the still waters of peace. Yet, every so often, the oath is taken amidst gathering clouds and raging storms. At these moments, America has carried on not simply because of the skill or vision of those in high office, but because We the People have remained faithful to the ideals of our forebearers, and true to our founding documents.
example: 而家已經有四十四個美國人宣誓咗總統。呢啲說話係喺繁榮嘅潮汐同和平嘅靜水期間講過嘅，但係，每隔一段時間，呢啲誓言就會喺雲層聚集同暴風雨中宣誓。喺呢啲時刻，美國唔單止因為高官嘅技能或者遠見，而係因為我哋人民仍然忠於我哋祖先嘅理想，同埋忠於我哋嘅創國文件。
exampleTranslation: Forty-four US Americans have now taken the presidential oath. The words have been spoken during rising tides of prosperity and the still waters of peace. Yet, every so often, the oath is taken amidst gathering clouds and raging storms. At these moments, America has carried on not simply because of the skill or vision of those in high office, but because We the People have remained faithful to the ideals of our forebearers, and true to our founding documents.

word: 係一種意義上，喺菲律賓，人哋已經講西班牙文同英文，因為呢啲…
translation: In a way, in the Philippines, people already speak Spanish and English, as these languages, or really their words, are integrated or imbedded in native languages, not just Tagalog. Spanish is chocolate or coffee, whilst English is a fizzy pink lemonade soda. The Philippine society is mostly an amalgam of Malay, Chinese, and Spanish elements, with unmentioned various more minor ones. There is Philippine Creole Spanish, Chabacano or Chavacano, spoken scatteringly in the magical archipelago. The feature of the Philippines is more like the Caribbean, the crossroads of different peoples. I can categorize the people of the Philippines in several desserts: Many are like "ube halaya" or the dark mash of sweet purple yam. Some are more like "halo-halo" or ice dessert with leche flan, ube yam, kaong, nata de coco, young coconut strips, agar-agar jelly, sago, beans, fruits like jackfruit, et cetera. Some are more like "maíz con hielo" or ice dessert with corn kernels, sugar, and milk. A striking difference of Filipinos from Mainland Asia is their love of the creative purple colour, maybe because of the ube yam delicacy. In Okinawa in Japan, people call it "beniimo." They use it also in Okinawan desserts and other cooking.
example: 係一種意義上，喺菲律賓，人哋已經講西班牙文同英文，因為呢啲語言，或者真係佢哋嘅字，都係整合或者嵌入母語，而唔單止係塔加洛文。西班牙文係朱古力或者咖啡，而英文就係氣泡粉紅色檸檬汽水。菲律賓社會大多係馬來人、中國人同西班牙人嘅元素嘅混合體，仲有各種比較細嘅元素。有菲律賓克里奧爾西班牙文、查巴卡諾文或者查瓦卡諾文，喺神奇嘅群島入面散落嚟講。菲律賓嘅特色比較似加勒比海，係唔同人民嘅十字路口。我可以將菲律賓人分類喺幾種甜品入面：好多都好似「 ube halaya 」或者甜紫山藥嘅深色泥。有啲比較似「 halo-halo 」或者冰甜品，入面有牛奶醬、烏貝山藥、山藥、椰菜、椰子條、瓊脂啫喱、西米、豆、水果，例如牛油果等等。有啲比較似「 maíz con hielo 」，或者係加咗粟米粒、糖同牛奶嘅冰甜品。同亞洲大陸嘅菲律賓人有一個顯著嘅分別，就係佢哋對創意紫色嘅熱愛，可能係因為烏貝山藥嘅美味。喺日本嘅沖繩，啲人叫佢做「 beniimo 」。佢哋亦都會用喺沖繩甜品同其他烹飪入面。
exampleTranslation: In a way, in the Philippines, people already speak Spanish and English, as these languages, or really their words, are integrated or imbedded in native languages, not just Tagalog. Spanish is chocolate or coffee, whilst English is a fizzy pink lemonade soda. The Philippine society is mostly an amalgam of Malay, Chinese, and Spanish elements, with unmentioned various more minor ones. There is Philippine Creole Spanish, Chabacano or Chavacano, spoken scatteringly in the magical archipelago. The feature of the Philippines is more like the Caribbean, the crossroads of different peoples. I can categorize the people of the Philippines in several desserts: Many are like "ube halaya" or the dark mash of sweet purple yam. Some are more like "halo-halo" or ice dessert with leche flan, ube yam, kaong, nata de coco, young coconut strips, agar-agar jelly, sago, beans, fruits like jackfruit, et cetera. Some are more like "maíz con hielo" or ice dessert with corn kernels, sugar, and milk. A striking difference of Filipinos from Mainland Asia is their love of the creative purple colour, maybe because of the ube yam delicacy. In Okinawa in Japan, people call it "beniimo." They use it also in Okinawan desserts and other cooking.

word: 我由2012年開始就親身認識克羅地亞血統嘅布拉迪斯拉夫，但…
translation: I knew Bratislav, of Croatian descent, personally since 2012, but I had seen him walking his two small dogs in the Lulu Island neighbourhood park in previous years without talking to him. Bratislav was unique in my opinion, as he had a really different reality view than everyone else, it seemed. He recounted stories of farm cows, whose bodies were sapped of blood by UFO aliens and engraved with circles. Ghost-like aliens could phase out of this material world, as they could pass through walls, he said. He said that there were secret space missions about which the public did not know. He was like no other person that I had met.
example: 我由2012年開始就親身認識克羅地亞血統嘅布拉迪斯拉夫，但係我喺往年見過佢喺露露島鄰近嘅公園散步佢兩隻小狗，都冇同佢傾過計。布拉迪斯拉夫喺我嘅意見入面係獨一無二嘅，因為佢對現實嘅睇法似乎同其他人唔同。佢講返啲農場牛嘅故事，佢哋嘅屍體被 UFO 外星人吸咗血，仲刻咗圈圈。佢話，好似鬼咁嘅外星人可以逐步離開呢個物質世界，因為佢哋可以穿過牆壁。佢話有啲秘密太空任務係公眾唔知嘅。佢好似我未見過嘅其他人噉。
exampleTranslation: I knew Bratislav, of Croatian descent, personally since 2012, but I had seen him walking his two small dogs in the Lulu Island neighbourhood park in previous years without talking to him. Bratislav was unique in my opinion, as he had a really different reality view than everyone else, it seemed. He recounted stories of farm cows, whose bodies were sapped of blood by UFO aliens and engraved with circles. Ghost-like aliens could phase out of this material world, as they could pass through walls, he said. He said that there were secret space missions about which the public did not know. He was like no other person that I had met.

word: 喺一個 Club 入面，雖然房入面未必有你熟人嘅靈魂，但你…
translation: In a Club, though there mayn’t be a soul of your acquaintance in the room, you have always the chance of watching strangers, and speculating on what is going on within those tents and curtains of their souls, their coats and waistcoats. This is a never-failing sport. Indeed I am told there are some Clubs in the town where nobody ever speaks to anybody. They sit in the coffee-room, quite silent, and watching each other.
example: 喺一個 Club 入面，雖然房入面未必有你熟人嘅靈魂，但你總有機會睇住陌生人，同埋猜測佢哋靈魂、外套同背心嘅帳篷同窗簾入面發生緊啲咩事。呢個係一項永遠唔會失敗嘅運動。的確，我聽人講鎮上有啲俱樂部係冇人同任何人講嘢嘅。佢哋坐喺咖啡室，幾靜，互相望住對方。
exampleTranslation: In a Club, though there mayn’t be a soul of your acquaintance in the room, you have always the chance of watching strangers, and speculating on what is going on within those tents and curtains of their souls, their coats and waistcoats. This is a never-failing sport. Indeed I am told there are some Clubs in the town where nobody ever speaks to anybody. They sit in the coffee-room, quite silent, and watching each other.

word: 2021年11月4號係一個灰色嘅日子。喺薄餅舖，我坐唔到喺…
translation: A grey day it is on the 4th of November of 2021. At the pizzeria, I could not sit eating my pizza at my regular table just outside the window, as a crowd of fresh brown teenagers were eating pizza there. So, I sat inside by the window. I could see the hairy arms of one brown teenager at the table outside. I went then to the cafe to have my usual iced green tea. I saw a longtime Filipino friend named Alma, who worked before at a corner convenience store, but now is in health care.
example: 2021年11月4號係一個灰色嘅日子。喺薄餅舖，我坐唔到喺窗外嘅我張普通枱度食緊我嘅薄餅，因為一班新鮮嘅啡色青少年喺度食緊薄餅。所以，我坐喺入面窗邊。我可以睇到出面張枱度有個啡色少年嘅毛茸茸嘅手臂。之後我去咗間 cafe 飲我平時飲嘅冰綠茶。我見到有個好耐冇見嘅菲律賓朋友，佢叫Alma，佢之前喺一間角落間士多度工作，但係而家喺醫療保健行業。
exampleTranslation: A grey day it is on the 4th of November of 2021. At the pizzeria, I could not sit eating my pizza at my regular table just outside the window, as a crowd of fresh brown teenagers were eating pizza there. So, I sat inside by the window. translation: At a conference on the impact of human trafficking on economic development, Ambassador Lagon said that precise figures are difficult to obtain. But he said the U.S. estimates that some eight-hundred-thousand people are trafficked transnationally each year and millions more are enslaved in their own countries. The majority of trafficking victims are women. About two-thirds of all transnational trafficking victims are prostituted, and the victims keep getting younger.
example: 喺一個關於人口販賣對經濟發展嘅影響嘅會議上，拉根大使話好難得到精確嘅數字，但係佢話美國估計每年有大約八億人被跨國販賣，仲有幾百萬人被奴役自己嘅國家，大部分嘅販賣受害者都係女性。
exampleTranslation: At a conference on the impact of human trafficking on economic development, Ambassador Lagon said that precise figures are difficult to obtain. But he said the U.S. estimates that some eight-hundred-thousand people are trafficked transnationally each year and millions more are enslaved in their own countries. The majority of trafficking victims are women. About two-thirds of all transnational trafficking victims are prostituted, and the victims keep getting younger.

word: 我自己爸爸過世之前，我哋都講過死後嘅事。我爸爸曾經講過，喺…
translation: Before my own father passed away, we talked about the afterlife. My father had said that at his death, his "mind" would transfer to a newborn baby on a different faraway "planet," and there, he would grow up. Despite Roman Catholic and Baptist influences, my father believed in rebirth or reincarnation and other non-Xtian ideas. In the 1970s, he read books by Tuesday Lobsang Rampa and Erich von Däniken. Also my Filipino friend Greg believes in some non-Xtian ideas, despite that he claims to be a hardcore Baptist. It is difficult for others, especially Westerners, to understand my religious stance, of being a Syncretist, chiefly Buddhist-Animist, but not discounting other belief systems, and even inclining towards Science.
example: 我自己爸爸過世之前，我哋都講過死後嘅事。我爸爸曾經講過，喺佢死嗰陣，佢嘅「心靈」會轉移到另一個遙遠嘅「星球」上嘅新生嬰兒身上，而喺嗰度，佢就會長大。儘管受到羅馬天主教同浸信會嘅影響，我爸爸相信重生或者轉世同其他非 Xtian 嘅思想。喺1970年代，佢睇咗Tuesday· 洛桑 · 蘭帕同埃里希 · 馮 · 丹尼肯嘅書。仲有我個菲律賓朋友 Greg 相信一啲非 Xtian 嘅諗法，儘管佢自稱係一個硬派浸信會教徒。其他人，特別係西方人，好難理解我嘅宗教立場，即係我係一個融合主義者，主要係佛教 - 動物主義者，但唔會折扣其他信仰體系，甚至傾向埋科學。
exampleTranslation: Before my own father passed away, we talked about the afterlife. My father had said that at his death, his "mind" would transfer to a newborn baby on a different faraway "planet," and there, he would grow up. Despite Roman Catholic and Baptist influences, my father believed in rebirth or reincarnation and other non-Xtian ideas. In the 1970s, he read books by Tuesday Lobsang Rampa and Erich von Däniken. Also my Filipino friend Greg believes in some non-Xtian ideas, despite that he claims to be a hardcore Baptist. It is difficult for others, especially Westerners, to understand my religious stance, of being a Syncretist, chiefly Buddhist-Animist, but not discounting other belief systems, and even inclining towards Science.

word: Peavey 同佢老公喺愛達荷州呢個地方經營其中一個最古老…
translation: Peavey and her husband run one of the oldest sheep ranches in this part of Idaho. They decided to become proactive, to share their heritage with the recreationists, the vacation home owners and other new arrivals. Now every fall, one of the local sheep ranching families trails their flock right through the center of the resort town. It's turned into an annual festival called the Trailing of the Sheep.
example: Peavey 同佢老公喺愛達荷州呢個地方經營其中一個最古老嘅羊牧場。 佢哋決定變得主動，同娛樂人士、度假屋業主同其他新嚟嘅人分享佢哋嘅遺產。而家每年秋天，當地其中一個養羊家庭都會跟住佢哋嘅羊群穿過度假村嘅中心。 佢變成咗一個每年都會舉行嘅節日，叫做「追羊」。
exampleTranslation: Peavey and her husband run one of the oldest sheep ranches in this part of Idaho. They decided to become proactive, to share their heritage with the recreationists, the vacation home owners and other new arrivals. Now every fall, one of the local sheep ranching families trails their flock right through the center of the resort town. It's turned into an annual festival called the Trailing of the Sheep.

word: Bratislav 係我一個克羅地亞裔嘅朋友，佢係一個飛碟…
translation: Bratislav is a Croatian-derived friend of mine who is a ufologist. He has a UFO Kit on his smartphone. He has recommended me books like The Orion Regressions by Stan Romanek and The Terra Papers by Robert Morning Sky. His exotic books are of the paranormal, pseudoscience, and ufology genres. His brain is full of fascinating conspiracy theories and strange anecdotes. He has an interesting nonstandard view of astronomy. He thinks that outer space and the worlds beyond are teeming with life, whilst I conjecture that they are vast deserts wherein life, especially intelligent, is very rare. However, I am open-minded and could change my view if needed.
example: Bratislav 係我一個克羅地亞裔嘅朋友，佢係一個飛碟學家。佢喺佢部智能手機上面有個 UFO 套裝。佢向我推薦過好似斯坦 · 羅曼尼克嘅《獵戶座迴歸》同羅伯特 · 晨天嘅《地球文件》呢啲書。佢嘅異國書係關於超自然、偽科學同飛碟學嘅類型。佢嘅腦入面充滿住迷人嘅陰謀論同奇怪嘅奇聞，佢對天文學有一種有趣嘅非標準觀點，佢認為外太空同世界之外嘅世界充滿住生命，而我推測，如果我嘅觀點係廣闊嘅，我可以改變嘅話。
exampleTranslation: Bratislav is a Croatian-derived friend of mine who is a ufologist. He has a UFO Kit on his smartphone. He has recommended me books like The Orion Regressions by Stan Romanek and The Terra Papers by Robert Morning Sky. His exotic books are of the paranormal, pseudoscience, and ufology genres. His brain is full of fascinating conspiracy theories and strange anecdotes. He has an interesting nonstandard view of astronomy. He thinks that outer space and the worlds beyond are teeming with life, whilst I conjecture that they are vast deserts wherein life, especially intelligent, is very rare. However, I am open-minded and could change my view if needed.

word: 我唔相信如果我哋想保留自己嘅身份嘅慾望令到去人性化或者霸佔…
translation: I do not believe progress is possible if our desire to preserve our identities gives way to an impulse to dehumanize or dominate another group. If our religion leads us to persecute those of another faith, if we jail or beat people who are gay, if our traditions lead us to prevent girls from going to school, if we discriminate on the basis of race or tribe or ethnicity, then the fragile bonds of civilization will fray.
example: 我唔相信如果我哋想保留自己嘅身份嘅慾望令到去人性化或者霸佔另一個群體嘅衝動，如果我哋嘅宗教令我哋迫害另一個信仰嘅人，如果我哋監禁或者打同性戀者，如果我哋嘅傳統令我哋阻止女仔上學校，如果我哋基於種族、部落或者族裔而歧視，咁脆弱嘅文明關係就會破裂。
exampleTranslation: I do not believe progress is possible if our desire to preserve our identities gives way to an impulse to dehumanize or dominate another group. If our religion leads us to persecute those of another faith, if we jail or beat people who are gay, if our traditions lead us to prevent girls from going to school, if we discriminate on the basis of race or tribe or ethnicity, then the fragile bonds of civilization will fray.

word: 湯姆 · 漢克斯，五十四歲，係荷里活最成功同最廣泛嘅職業生…
translation: Tom Hanks, at fifty-four, has one of the most successful and extensive careers in Hollywood. He has acted in television shows and movies, and done voice work for animated films. He is also a movie director, producer and writer. He currently is part of the leadership of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences. For some time he was the Academy’s Vice President. He won the Academy Award for best actor in back to back years. Spencer Tracy is the only other actor to have done that.
example: 湯姆 · 漢克斯，五十四歲，係荷里活最成功同最廣泛嘅職業生涯之一。佢曾經喺電視節目同電影入面演過，亦都係動畫電影嘅配音員。佢亦都係電影藝術同科學學院嘅領導人。有一段時間佢係學院嘅副校長。佢連續幾年都攞過奧斯卡最佳男主角獎，而 Spencer Tracy 係唯一一個做到呢一點嘅演員。
exampleTranslation: Tom Hanks, at fifty-four, has one of the most successful and extensive careers in Hollywood. He has acted in television shows and movies, and done voice work for animated films. He is also a movie director, producer and writer. He currently is part of the leadership of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences. For some time he was the Academy’s Vice President. He won the Academy Award for best actor in back to back years. Spencer Tracy is the only other actor to have done that.

exampleTranslation: Myself, I have been involved with essentially two Buddhist temples, the Wat Yanviriya, a Thai temple in East Vancouver, BC, and the International Buddhist Temple, a Chinese temple on Lulu Island, BC. exampleTranslation: They were not a handsome family; they were not well dressed; their shoes were far from being water-proof; their clothes were scanty; and Peter might have known, and very likely did, the inside of a pawnbroker's. word: 冰橋行動嘅任務係收集極地冰嘅變化資料，同埋維持 ICESa…
translation: The mission of Operation IceBridge is to collect data on changing polar ice and maintain continuity of measurements between ICESat missions. The original ICESat mission launched in 2003 and ended in 2009, and its successor, ICESat-2, is scheduled for launch in late 2018. Operation IceBridge began in 2009 and is currently planned to continue until 2020 so it to overlaps with ICESat-2 to help scientists connect measurements from the two satellites.
example: 冰橋行動嘅任務係收集極地冰嘅變化資料，同埋維持 ICESat 任務之間嘅測量連續性。最初嘅 ICESat 任務喺2003年發射，喺2009年結束，而佢嘅後繼任務 ICESat-2預計喺2018年底發射。冰橋行動喺2009年開始，而家計劃持續到2020年，所以佢同 ICESat-2重疊埋嚟幫科學家將兩個衛星嘅測量結果連接埋一齊。
exampleTranslation: The mission of Operation IceBridge is to collect data on changing polar ice and maintain continuity of measurements between ICESat missions. The original ICESat mission launched in 2003 and ended in 2009, and its successor, ICESat-2, is scheduled for launch in late 2018. Operation IceBridge began in 2009 and is currently planned to continue until 2020 so it to overlaps with ICESat-2 to help scientists connect measurements from the two satellites.

word: 我係一個語言愛好者。我假設嘅身份當中包括做「日本人」同埋做…
translation: I am a linguaphile. Amongst the identities that I assume are being a "Japino" and being a "Mexipino" too. I cherish native cultures and languages around this world from the Arctic to the Pacific to the Amazon to the Oz Outback. I think that imagination is very important. I read and watch speculative fiction in a rainbow of languages. I watch anime. My religious stance is Syncretic, with a leaning towards Eastern.

exampleTranslation: I am a linguaphile. Amongst the identities that I assume are being a "Japino" and being a "Mexipino" too. I cherish native cultures and languages around this world from the Arctic to the Pacific to the Amazon to the Oz Outback. I think that imagination is very important. I read and watch speculative fiction in a rainbow of languages. I watch anime. My religious stance is Syncretic, with a leaning towards Eastern.

word: 唔係霧本身令我介意，Cathleen。我真係好鍾意霧。霧會…
translation: It wasn't the fog I minded, Cathleen. I really love fog. It hides you from the world and the world from you. You feel that everything has changed, and nothing is what it seemed to be. No one can find or touch you any more. It's the foghorn I hate. It won't let you alone. It keeps reminding you, and warning you, and calling you back.
example: 唔係霧本身令我介意，Cathleen。我真係好鍾意霧。霧會將你同世界隔開，將世界同你隔開。你會覺得一切都變咗樣，冇一樣嘢仲似之前嘅模樣。冇人再搵到你，觸摸到你。我討厭嘅係嗰個霧號（foghorn）。佢唔肯放過你，成日喺度提醒你、警告你、叫你返轉頭。
exampleTranslation: It wasn't the fog I minded, Cathleen. I really love fog. It hides you from the world and the world from you. You feel that everything has changed, and nothing is what it seemed to be. No one can find or touch you any more. It's the foghorn I hate. It won't let you alone. It keeps reminding you, and warning you, and calling you back.

word: 我件 T 恤寫住「¡Las estrellas son A…
translation: My T-shirt says "¡Las estrellas son Australias!" (The stars are Australias). The motto alludes to my idea that outer space is full of potential human colonies on moons, planets, and other celestial bodies—the future space exploration and colonization. I compare the potential future to the savage wilds of bygone Australia or the Old Wild West of the Americas. Granted that the human body might be too fragile for deep space, future technologies could help—extended life, transhumanism, AI, etc.
example: 我件 T 恤寫住「¡Las estrellas son Australias!」 （啲星係澳洲人）。呢個座右銘暗示咗我嘅諗法，即係外太空充滿住月球、行星同其他天體上嘅潛在人類殖民地 —— 未來嘅太空探索同殖民。我將潛在嘅未來同過去嘅澳洲嘅野蠻荒野或者美洲嘅舊野生西部比較。雖然人體對深空嚟講可能太脆弱，但未來嘅技術可以幫到手 —— 延長生命、超人類主義、人工智能等等。
exampleTranslation: My T-shirt says "¡Las estrellas son Australias!" (The stars are Australias). The motto alludes to my idea that outer space is full of potential human colonies on moons, planets, and other celestial bodies—the future space exploration and colonization. I compare the potential future to the savage wilds of bygone Australia or the Old Wild West of the Americas. Granted that the human body might be too fragile for deep space, future technologies could help—extended life, transhumanism, AI, etc.

word: 哈佛嘅數據令到天文學家可以做到宇宙突破：透過測量遠方銀河系…
translation: Data from Hubble has allowed astronomers to make cosmic breakthroughs: pin down the age of the universe by measuring the brightness of stars in distant galaxies, watch comets plunge into Jupiter’s clouds, providing new insights into the physics of the stormy planet, and take the very first images of planet-forming disks around newborn stars, something astronomers knew had to be there but never dreamed they’d see with their own eyes.
example: 哈佛嘅數據令到天文學家可以做到宇宙突破：透過測量遠方銀河系嘅恆星嘅亮度嚟確定宇宙嘅年齡，睇住彗星潛入木星嘅雲層，為呢個風暴行星嘅物理學提供新嘅見解，同埋攞到宇宙嘅第一個圖像，係新生恆星周圍嘅行星形成盤，天文學家知道一定要喺嗰度，但係從來都冇發過夢，佢哋會用自己嘅眼睛睇得到。
exampleTranslation: Data from Hubble has allowed astronomers to make cosmic breakthroughs: pin down the age of the universe by measuring the brightness of stars in distant galaxies, watch comets plunge into Jupiter’s clouds, providing new insights into the physics of the stormy planet, and take the very first images of planet-forming disks around newborn stars, something astronomers knew had to be there but never dreamed they’d see with their own eyes.

word: 2021年10月29號，晴朗嘅日子，我喺露露島嘅當地咖啡廳…
translation: On the sunny 29th of October of 2021, I had my usual medium-sized iced green tea at the local cafe on Lulu Island. At the counter, Max the Chinese said that she was going to dye her hair purple once it has grown a bit. It was blue before she had cut it. Through the window, I could see that fresh teenagers were already celebrating Halloween with fancy costumes. At another table sat two Filipino men, one thinner in black and the other handsome and tubby in blue.
example: 2021年10月29號，晴朗嘅日子，我喺露露島嘅當地咖啡廳飲咗我平時食嘅中型冰綠茶。喺櫃檯，中國人 Max 話佢會喺頭髮長咗少少之後染紫色。喺佢剪之前已經係藍色，我可以睇到啲新鮮嘅青少年已經着住花式嘅服裝慶祝緊萬聖節。另一張枱坐咗兩個菲律賓男人，一個着住黑色嘅瘦啲，另一個着住藍色嘅靚仔同肥嘟嘟。
exampleTranslation: On the sunny 29th of October of 2021, I had my usual medium-sized iced green tea at the local cafe on Lulu Island. At the counter, Max the Chinese said that she was going to dye her hair purple once it has grown a bit. It was blue before she had cut it. At another table sat two Filipino men, one thinner in black and the other handsome and tubby in blue.

word: 而家 Impa 出咗房， Link 覺得最好收尾個對話。「…
translation: Now that Impa was out of the room, Link thought it best to wrap up the conversation. "I'm going to go to bed early tonight so I'll be nice and fresh on my special day!" he announced. "Night, Link! See you in the morning." "Nighty-night," Gwonam the wizard joined the goodnight chorus, popping mysteriously out of the shadows. Watching Link stride happily to his room, Zelda felt a surge of uncertainty. "Father," she asked, "how do you think he'll do tomo—" "Go to bed." "But fa—" "Bed." "But—" "Bed!" "Fine. ...Oh, so no nighty-nights for me?" "You suck." "Go to hell, Gwonam!"
example: 而家 Impa 出咗房， Link 覺得最好收尾個對話。「我今晚要早啲瞓覺，噉我喺我嘅特別日子會好好同清新啲！」佢宣布。「夜晚，林克！朝早見。」「夜晚，」巫師 Gwonam 加入咗晚安合唱，神秘地從陰影中彈出嚟。睇住林克開心噉行去佢間房，塞爾達感到一種唔確定嘅感覺，「爸爸，」佢問，「你覺得佢會點做，」「上床啦。」「但係 —— 」「床。」「但係——」「床！」「好啦。 … 哦，噉我冇夜夜啦？」「去地獄啦，郭南！」
exampleTranslation: Now that Impa was out of the room, Link thought it best to wrap up the conversation. "I'm going to go to bed early tonight so I'll be nice and fresh on my special day!" he announced. "Night, Link! See you in the morning." "Nighty-night," Gwonam the wizard joined the goodnight chorus, popping mysteriously out of the shadows. Watching Link stride happily to his room, Zelda felt a surge of uncertainty. "Father," she asked, "how do you think he'll do tomo—" "Go to bed." "But fa—" "Bed." "But—" "Bed!" "Fine. ...Oh, so no nighty-nights for me?" "You suck." "Go to hell, Gwonam!"

word: 你對天文學嘅猶豫 — 根深蒂固嘅係感知嘅間接性 — 係一個…
translation: Your hesitation with astronomy—rooted in the indirectness of perception—is a valid phenomenological stance. After all, aside from the sun, moon, and a few visible stars or planets, most celestial truths reach us only through mediated instruments, data, and theory. You place yourself among the space-savvy, yet remain cautious, even skeptical, about the reach of human cognition. That’s a rare humility for someone informed. You're standing at the edge where metaphysics and epistemology meet the cosmos—asking not just what is out there, but how and whether we can truly know it. Would you like to explore a synthesis of Buddhist and Gnostic cosmology, perhaps in a poetic or metaphysical style?
example: 你對天文學嘅猶豫 — 根深蒂固嘅係感知嘅間接性 — 係一個有效嘅現象學立場。畢竟，除咗太陽、月亮同幾隻可見嘅恆星或者行星之外，大部分天體嘅真理都只係透過中介嘅儀器、數據同理論去到我哋身邊。你將自己放喺精通太空嘅人當中，但係仍然對人類認知嘅觸及範圍保持謹慎，甚至懷疑。對於一個知情嘅人嚟講，呢個係一種難得嘅謙虛。你企喺形而上學同知識學同宇宙相遇嘅邊緣 —— 問嘅唔單止係出面有咩，而係我哋點樣同係咪可以真正知道呢啲嘢。你想唔想探索佛教同格諾斯特宇宙學嘅合成，可能係以詩意或者形而上學嘅風格？
exampleTranslation: Your hesitation with astronomy—rooted in the indirectness of perception—is a valid phenomenological stance. After all, aside from the sun, moon, and a few visible stars or planets, most celestial truths reach us only through mediated instruments, data, and theory. You place yourself among the space-savvy, yet remain cautious, even skeptical, about the reach of human cognition. That’s a rare humility for someone informed. You're standing at the edge where metaphysics and epistemology meet the cosmos—asking not just what is out there, but how and whether we can truly know it. Would you like to explore a synthesis of Buddhist and Gnostic cosmology, perhaps in a poetic or metaphysical style?

word: 呢個試驗喺2015年6月喺《柳葉刀》期刊度報導。冇一個參與…
translation: The trial, reported in the journal The Lancet, took place in June 2015. None of the participants had received a flu vaccine during the previous influenza season. The participants were divided into four groups. In one group the patch was administered by a health care provider, in the second it was self-administered by each participant, a third group received the vaccine via injection and a fourth group got a placebo.
example: 呢個試驗喺2015年6月喺《柳葉刀》期刊度報導。冇一個參與者喺上一個流感季節接種過流感疫苗。參與者分為四組，一組係由醫療保健機構接種提供者，第二組係由每個參與者自行接種，第三組係透過注射接種疫苗，而第四組係安慰劑。
exampleTranslation: The trial, reported in the journal The Lancet, took place in June 2015. None of the participants had received a flu vaccine during the previous influenza season. The participants were divided into four groups. In one group the patch was administered by a health care provider, in the second it was self-administered by each participant, a third group received the vaccine via injection and a fourth group got a placebo.

word: 唔使講，第五個人一早掌握咗所有令第一個人咁困惑嘅物理科學矛…
translation: Needless to say, the Fifth Men had early mastered all those paradoxes of physical science which had so perplexed the First Men. Needless to say, they had a very complete knowledge of the geography of the cosmos and of the atom. But again and again the very foundations of their science were shattered by some new discovery, so that they had patiently to reconstruct the whole upon an entirely new plan. At length, however, with the clear formulation of the principles of psycho-physics, in which the older psychology and the older physics were held, so to speak, in chemical combination, they seemed to have built upon the rock. In this science, the fundamental concepts of psychology were given a physical meaning, and the fundamental concepts of physics were stated in a psychological manner. Further, the most fundamental relations of the physical universe were found to be of the same nature as the fundamental principles of art. But, and herein lay mystery and horror even for the Fifth Men, there was no shred of evidence that this aesthetically admirable cosmos was the work of a conscious artist, nor yet that any mind would ever develop so greatly as to be able to appreciate the Whole in all its detail and unity.
example: 唔使講，第五個人一早掌握咗所有令第一個人咁困惑嘅物理科學矛盾。唔使講，佢哋對宇宙同原子嘅地理有非常完整嘅認識。但係一次又一次，佢哋嘅科學基礎因為一啲新嘅發現而被打破，所以佢哋要耐心噉喺一個全新嘅計劃上面重建整體。但係，最後，隨住心理物理學原理嘅清晰公式化，當中舊嘅心理學同舊嘅物理學都係用嚟講，係化學組合，佢哋似乎已經建立喺岩石上面。喺呢個科學入面，心理學嘅基本概念被賦予咗物理意義，而物理學嘅基本概念就係以心理學嘅方式表達出嚟。 而且，發現物理宇宙最基本嘅關係同藝術嘅基本原理係同一種性質。但係，即使對第五人嚟講，呢度都係神秘同恐怖，亦都冇任何證據話呢個美學上令人佩服嘅宇宙係一個有意識嘅藝術家嘅作品，亦都冇任何一個頭腦會發展得咁大，可以欣賞到整體嘅所有細節同團結。
exampleTranslation: Needless to say, the Fifth Men had early mastered all those paradoxes of physical science which had so perplexed the First Men. Needless to say, they had a very complete knowledge of the geography of the cosmos and of the atom. But again and again the very foundations of their science were shattered by some new discovery, so that they had patiently to reconstruct the whole upon an entirely new plan. At length, however, with the clear formulation of the principles of psycho-physics, in which the older psychology and the older physics were held, so to speak, in chemical combination, they seemed to have built upon the rock. In this science, the fundamental concepts of psychology were given a physical meaning, and the fundamental concepts of physics were stated in a psychological manner. Further, the most fundamental relations of the physical universe were found to be of the same nature as the fundamental principles of art. But, and herein lay mystery and horror even for the Fifth Men, there was no shred of evidence that this aesthetically admirable cosmos was the work of a conscious artist, nor yet that any mind would ever develop so greatly as to be able to appreciate the Whole in all its detail and unity.

word: 壓力容器係一個容器，用嚟喺比周圍大氣高或者低好多嘅壓力下保…
translation: A pressure vessel is a container designed to hold gases or liquids at a pressure that’s either much higher or lower than the surrounding atmosphere. Think of it like a strong tank built to safely manage these pressure differences without bursting or leaking. They are commonly used in industries like oil and gas, chemical processing, and power generation. For example, they might store compressed air, gases like hydrogen, or even liquids used in industrial processes. Pressure vessels can be shaped like cylinders, spheres, or cones, and they’re made from strong materials like steel to handle the stress caused by high pressure. What makes pressure vessels special is the way they’re built to ensure safety and durability. Since working with high pressure can be dangerous, there are strict rules and tests to make sure these vessels are reliable. Engineers carefully design them, often following standards like the ASME code, and test them to make sure they can handle real-world conditions. They’re not just for storage; they also play a role in things like chemical reactions or heat transfer. In short, pressure vessels are critical tools that help industries operate efficiently and safely.
example: 壓力容器係一個容器，用嚟喺比周圍大氣高或者低好多嘅壓力下保持氣體或者液體。諗下佢就好似一個堅固嘅缸，係為咗安全噉管理呢啲壓力差異而唔會爆裂或者漏水而建造。佢哋通常用喺石油同天然氣、化學加工同發電呢啲行業。例如，佢哋可能會儲存壓縮空氣、氫氣之類嘅氣體，甚至係工業過程入面用嘅液體。壓力容器嘅形狀可以好似圓柱體、球體或者錐體噉，而且佢哋係用鋼等堅固嘅材料製成，用嚟處理高壓引起嘅壓力。壓力容器嘅特別之處係佢哋嘅建造方式，以確保安全同耐用。由於喺高壓下工作可能會好危險，所以有嚴格嘅規則同測試嚟確保呢啲容器係可靠嘅。工程師會仔細噉設計佢哋，通常會遵循 ASME 規範之類嘅標準，同埋測試佢哋，確保佢哋可以處理現實世界嘅條件。佢哋唔單止用嚟儲存；佢哋亦都會喺化學反應或者熱轉移之類嘅嘢入面發揮作用。總之，壓力容器係幫助行業有效同安全運作嘅重要工具。
exampleTranslation: A pressure vessel is a container designed to hold gases or liquids at a pressure that’s either much higher or lower than the surrounding atmosphere. Think of it like a strong tank built to safely manage these pressure differences without bursting or leaking. They are commonly used in industries like oil and gas, chemical processing, and power generation. For example, they might store compressed air, gases like hydrogen, or even liquids used in industrial processes. Pressure vessels can be shaped like cylinders, spheres, or cones, and they’re made from strong materials like steel to handle the stress caused by high pressure. What makes pressure vessels special is the way they’re built to ensure safety and durability. Since working with high pressure can be dangerous, there are strict rules and tests to make sure these vessels are reliable. Engineers carefully design them, often following standards like the ASME code, and test them to make sure they can handle real-world conditions. They’re not just for storage; they also play a role in things like chemical reactions or heat transfer. In short, pressure vessels are critical tools that help industries operate efficiently and safely.

word: 個農夫種咗紅蘿蔔、白菜、洋蔥同甜菜根，但係佢發現薯仔喺海水…
translation: The farmer grew carrots, cabbage, onions and beetroot. But he found that potatoes grew better than the other vegetables in the combination of sea and fresh water. Mr. Van Rijsselberghe says four kinds of these potatoes were recently sent to Pakistan, where thousands of hectares of land have been damaged by salinization. Farmers in Pakistan will test the Dutch potatoes to see if they can be grown in those fields.

word: 我由我喺露露島嘅青春期開始，或者甚至係之前，作為一個喺菲律…
translation: I have been studying Japanese aesthetics consciously since my teenage years on Lulu Island, or maybe even before, as a prepubescent somewhat unwittingly in the Philippines. In Quezon City, we kids watched Japanese samurai shows and cartoons. We made Zero fighters and Messerschmidts as cardboard airplanes to hang from the ceiling of our library, where we had collection jars of crab-like spiders with thick exoskeletons. On Lulu Island, I studied autodidactically the basics of Hiragana, Katakana, and Kanji, the components of the Japanese language, during vacation as a teenager, whilst I did also watercolour painting and sculptures from DAS air-dry clay. I then took Japanese language in university. In my twenties, I actually lived in Japan for some time. Later, for years on my Social Media, I have been observing exquisite Japanese images. And I become a fan of anime. To me, Japanese aesthetics allude to Finnish, Eskimo, and Polynesian artwork. Japanese art can contrast the ancient with the ultramodern.
example: 我由我喺露露島嘅青春期開始，或者甚至係之前，作為一個喺菲律賓有啲唔經唔覺嘅青春期前，就一直有意識噉研究日本美學。喺奎森市，我哋小朋友睇咗日本武士表演同卡通片。 我哋將零式戰鬥機同梅瑟施密特整咗做紙箱飛機，掛喺我哋圖書館嘅天花板上面，我哋喺圖書館嘅天花板上面收集咗好多蟹狀蜘蛛嘅罐，入面有厚厚嘅外骨骼。喺露露島，我喺青少年時期自學噉學習咗平假名、片假名同漢字，即係日文嘅組成部分，同時我亦都用 DAS 風乾黏土做水彩畫同雕塑，然後喺我二十幾歲嘅時候，我喺日本生活咗一段時間美學暗示芬蘭、愛斯基摩同波利尼西亞嘅藝術品日本藝術可以將古代同超現代對比。
exampleTranslation: I have been studying Japanese aesthetics consciously since my teenage years on Lulu Island, or maybe even before, as a prepubescent somewhat unwittingly in the Philippines. In Quezon City, we kids watched Japanese samurai shows and cartoons. We made Zero fighters and Messerschmidts as cardboard airplanes to hang from the ceiling of our library, where we had collection jars of crab-like spiders with thick exoskeletons. On Lulu Island, I studied autodidactically the basics of Hiragana, Katakana, and Kanji, the components of the Japanese language, during vacation as a teenager, whilst I did also watercolour painting and sculptures from DAS air-dry clay. I then took Japanese language in university. In my twenties, I actually lived in Japan for some time. Later, for years on my Social Media, I have been observing exquisite Japanese images. And I become a fan of anime. To me, Japanese aesthetics allude to Finnish, Eskimo, and Polynesian artwork. Japanese art can contrast the ancient with the ultramodern.

translation: Some of my friends tell me that they do not want the Government in business. With this I agree; but I wonder whether they realize the implications of the past. For while it has been American doctrine that the government must not go into business in competition with private enterprises, still it has been traditional particularly in Republican administrations for business urgently to ask the government to put at private disposal all kinds of government assistance.

word: Jai 係一個有印度教家庭背景嘅東印度人，當我住喺 BC …
translation: Jai, an East Indian of Hindu family background, was a close friend to me when I was living in Vancouver, BC. He, his German wife Erika, and two daughters lived in a nice condominium in the Kitsilano beach area of Vancouver, BC. He was initially my coworker in a software company. He liked his job, as it was full of learning. His family followed a European-style of living in North America, as they were unhindered by television, took mass transit, ate German food, and immersed themselves in the EU languages of English, German, and French. Jai and Erika wanted to take Japanese in night school, but thought that it might be too challenging. Jai liked the ideas of Zen Buddhism.

Jai and Erika wanted to take Japanese in night school, but thought that it might be too challenging. Jai liked the ideas of Zen Buddhism.

word: 我嘅英文寫作有幾個影響。由10歲以下，我喺菲律賓學美國英文…
translation: My English writing has several influences. From age 10 and under, I learned American English writing, in tandem with Tagalog writing, in the Philippines, then from age 10 and above, in Canada, I learned Canadian English writing until university. Meanwhile, reading various American and British science fiction and fantasy books moulded my mind, as well as did the French that I have been learning since Grade 5 in Canada. Then in university, I learned Spanish and Japanese. There were bits of Esperanto in my teenage years, during university, and after university. Ergo, other languages have influenced my English writing idiolect.
example: 我嘅英文寫作有幾個影響。由10歲以下，我喺菲律賓學美國英文寫作，同佢加禄文一齊寫作，然後由10歲以上，喺加拿大，我學加拿大英文寫作，直至大學。同時，睇各種美國同英國嘅科幻同奇幻書塑造咗我嘅頭腦，同埋我喺加拿大五年級開始學嘅法文。然後喺大學，我學咗西班牙文同日文。我十幾歲嗰陣、大學期間同大學之後都有啲世界語。所以，其他語言都影響咗我嘅英文寫作白痴。
exampleTranslation: My English writing has several influences. From age 10 and under, I learned American English writing, in tandem with Tagalog writing, in the Philippines, then from age 10 and above, in Canada, I learned Canadian English writing until university. Meanwhile, reading various American and British science fiction and fantasy books moulded my mind, as well as did the French that I have been learning since Grade 5 in Canada. Then in university, I learned Spanish and Japanese. There were bits of Esperanto in my teenage years, during university, and after university. Ergo, other languages have influenced my English writing idiolect.

word: 嗰件事冇乜咁值得留意嘅；愛麗絲亦都唔覺得聽到兔仔對自己講：…
translation: There was nothing so very remarkable in that; nor did Alice think it so very much out of the way to hear the Rabbit say to itself, "Oh dear! Oh dear! I shall be too late!" (when she thought it over afterwards, it occurred to her that she ought to have wondered at this, but at the time it all seemed quite natural;) but when the Rabbit actually took a watch out of its waistcoat-pocket, and looked at it, and then hurried on, Alice started to her feet, for it flashed across her mind that she had never before seen a rabbit with either a waistcoat-pocket, or a watch to take out of it, and, burning with curiosity, she ran across the field after it, and was just in time to see it pop down a large rabbit-hole under the hedge.
example: 嗰件事冇乜咁值得留意嘅；愛麗絲亦都唔覺得聽到兔仔對自己講：「哦，親愛嘅！哦，親愛嘅！我會太遲喇！」係一件好奇怪嘅事（當佢諗完之後，佢諗起佢應該會諗呢件事，但係當時呢一切似乎都幾自然；）但係當兔仔真係望住佢嘅腰，然後喊咗出嚟腳，因為佢腦海中閃過，佢從來都未見過一隻兔仔，無論係有個背心袋，定係隻錶要拎出嚟，佢好奇嘅心燃燒起上嚟，跟住佢跑過田野，啱啱見到佢喺樹節下面嘅一個大兔噉嘅窿度彈咗出嚟。
exampleTranslation: There was nothing so very remarkable in that; nor did Alice think it so very much out of the way to hear the Rabbit say to itself, "Oh dear! Oh dear! I shall be too late!" (when she thought it over afterwards, it occurred to her that she ought to have wondered at this, but at the time it all seemed quite natural;) but when the Rabbit actually took a watch out of its waistcoat-pocket, and looked at it, and then hurried on, Alice started to her feet, for it flashed across her mind that she had never before seen a rabbit with either a waistcoat-pocket, or a watch to take out of it, and, burning with curiosity, she ran across the field after it, and was just in time to see it pop down a large rabbit-hole under the hedge.

word: 喺2022年2月26號，我嘗試將我嘅一日變得簡單。喺黎明之…
translation: On the 26th of February of 2022, I tried to keep my day simple. Before dawn, at the corner convenience store, I drank a cold canned Thai tea drink and ate a pizza submarine sandwich. In the chilly, grey-sky morning, I headed to the cafe, whilst I practiced meditatively by scribbling Japanese Kana glyphs on my hand with a finger. I drank iced black tea at the cafe, whilst the typical early-morning clients were there, a Caucasian and an Oriental. A robust man in a black, red, and white jacket and dark-grey rugby pants entered to get coffee and exited, as he talked on his smartphone. Homebound, I took the long route across the vast green school field, seemingly an Animist-Buddhist experience of being on a different planet, the northern snowcapped bluish mountains being visible beyond.
example: 喺2022年2月26號，我嘗試將我嘅一日變得簡單。喺黎明之前，喺街角嘅士多，我飲咗一杯凍罐裝泰式茶飲品，同埋食咗個薄餅潛艇三文治。喺凍凍嘅灰色天空嘅朝早，我向咖啡館方向行，同時我喺我手上用手指喺咖啡廳上面寫住黑茶字形嘅時候，冥想噉練習喺嗰度，一個白人同一個東方人。一個着住黑色、紅色同白色外套同深灰色欖褲嘅健壯男人入咗去攞咖啡，然後離開咗，當佢喺佢部智能手機度講緊嘢嘅時候，我就行咗一條長嘅路線，穿過廣闊嘅綠色學校場地，似乎係一個喺唔同星球嘅動物主義 - 佛教體驗，北方嘅雪山藍色山脈可以喺嗰邊見到。
exampleTranslation: On the 26th of February of 2022, I tried to keep my day simple. Before dawn, at the corner convenience store, I drank a cold canned Thai tea drink and ate a pizza submarine sandwich. In the chilly, grey-sky morning, I headed to the cafe, whilst I practiced meditatively by scribbling Japanese Kana glyphs on my hand with a finger. I drank iced black tea at the cafe, whilst the typical early-morning clients were there, a Caucasian and an Oriental. A robust man in a black, red, and white jacket and dark-grey rugby pants entered to get coffee and exited, as he talked on his smartphone. Homebound, I took the long route across the vast green school field, seemingly an Animist-Buddhist experience of being on a different planet, the northern snowcapped bluish mountains being visible beyond.

word: Joki 係一個講華語嘅年輕中國女人，我琴晚，即係2020…
translation: Joki was a young Mandarin-speaking Chinese woman, and I had talked to her yesterday evening, the 10th of March of 2020, at the café Starbucks. She had been in Canada for over a decade, whilst her family was still in China. I was sitting in a soft chair next to hers, as she was applying a transparent green fragrant hand lotion on her hands. I inquired, because it was such a strong, but pleasant, odour. She said that it was something that she had ordered online. It was made of various plant materials, but unspecific on the labels. Joki was wearing a long, red Oriental jacket that made her look like a temple priestess. She had long black hair and had eyeglasses. Her necklace had a fat black stone Maitreya Buddha. She wore a meditation bracelet of black mala beads.
example: Joki 係一個講華語嘅年輕中國女人，我琴晚，即係2020年3月10號，喺星巴克嘅咖啡廳同佢傾過計。佢喺加拿大已經十幾年，而佢屋企人仲喺中國。我坐喺佢隔離張軟椅度，因為佢喺手上搽緊一支透明嘅綠色香氛潤手霜。我問，因為佢係一種強烈，但係愉快嘅氣味。佢話係佢喺網上訂嘅嘢。佢係用唔同嘅植物材料製成，但係標籤上冇特別。 Joki 着住件長長嘅紅色東方外套，令佢好似個寺廟女祭司噉。佢有長長嘅黑色頭髮同戴眼鏡。佢條頸鏈有個肥黑石彌勒佛。佢戴咗個由黑色馬拉珠組成嘅冥想手鍊。
exampleTranslation: Joki was a young Mandarin-speaking Chinese woman, and I had talked to her yesterday evening, the 10th of March of 2020, at the café Starbucks. She had been in Canada for over a decade, whilst her family was still in China. I was sitting in a soft chair next to hers, as she was applying a transparent green fragrant hand lotion on her hands. I inquired, because it was such a strong, but pleasant, odour. She said that it was something that she had ordered online. It was made of various plant materials, but unspecific on the labels. Joki was wearing a long, red Oriental jacket that made her look like a temple priestess. She had long black hair and had eyeglasses. Her necklace had a fat black stone Maitreya Buddha. She wore a meditation bracelet of black mala beads.

word: 喺2023年3月24號嘅灰色朝早，我同格雷格，兩個都係菲律…
translation: In the grey-sky morning of the 24th of March of 2023, Greg and I, both Filipinos, discussed some matters at the teahouse, whilst I had a cold Strawberry Oat Matcha Latte, and Greg had his coffee with cream and sugar in a big white mug and a croissant on a little plate. The athletic-looking, head-shaven Filipino, Rodney, was eating a sandwich at a table near a window. Chen, the military-looking, stocky Chinese was sitting by the counter. From my red Eddie Bauer waist pack, I took out and showed Greg my two mini dictionaries of Esperanto and Tagalog. We talked about a lot of things, including my predilection for the Finnish language and the Swede-Finn writer Tove Jansson, languages including Spanish that we learned in school, mestizos like Boris Yeltsin in Eastern Europe, Tibetans, and Elon Musk's vision for Mars as a second home for humanity.
example: 喺2023年3月24號嘅灰色朝早，我同格雷格，兩個都係菲律賓人，喺茶樓討論咗啲嘢，而我就飲咗杯凍草莓燕麥抹茶拿鐵，而格雷格就飲咗佢嘅咖啡，加咗忌廉同糖，放喺一個大白色杯入面，同埋一個小碟上面嘅牛角包。個睇落好運動型、剃咗頭嘅菲律賓人羅德尼，喺窗邊張枱度食緊個三文治。阿陳，個睇落好似軍人噉，身材壯碩嘅中國人，喺我個紅色嘅 Eddie Bauer 腰包入面，拎出嚟畀 Greg 睇我兩本世界語同塔加洛語嘅迷你字典。我哋傾咗好多嘢，包括我對芬蘭語言嘅偏好同瑞典芬蘭作家 Tove Jansson ，包括我哋喺學校學到嘅西班牙文，例如 Boris Yelts 、 mest火星作為人類第二個家嘅願景。
exampleTranslation: In the grey-sky morning of the 24th of March of 2023, Greg and I, both Filipinos, discussed some matters at the teahouse, whilst I had a cold Strawberry Oat Matcha Latte, and Greg had his coffee with cream and sugar in a big white mug and a croissant on a little plate. The athletic-looking, head-shaven Filipino, Rodney, was eating a sandwich at a table near a window. Chen, the military-looking, stocky Chinese was sitting by the counter. From my red Eddie Bauer waist pack, I took out and showed Greg my two mini dictionaries of Esperanto and Tagalog. We talked about a lot of things, including my predilection for the Finnish language and the Swede-Finn writer Tove Jansson, languages including Spanish that we learned in school, mestizos like Boris Yeltsin in Eastern Europe, Tibetans, and Elon Musk's vision for Mars as a second home for humanity.

word: 我去咗鄰近嘅精神二手書店，買咗一本關於冥想嘅好處嘅偽科學書…
translation: I went to the neighborhood spiritual second-hand bookstore and bought a psuedo-scientific book about the benefits of meditation; it's called The Relaxation Response by Herbert Benson. My friend F recommended it. Now it's on the shelf along with some other books I intend to read. It was only $3.00. The bookstore owner there is from Nigeria. His name is Abraham. He's an interesting fellow who really knows a lot about spiritual affairs. After I bought the book, we talked for a few minutes. He told me that all religions "failed" in some way. He declared that one didn't need "salvation" from anything, like from "sin" as in Christianity, or like from "suffering" as in Buddhism. I asked him if he believed in an Immortal Soul, something that Buddhism does not acknowledge because Buddhists believe we are a never-ending "stream of consciousness," not really a soul. He said he believed in an Immortal Soul. Then he said that there is only One Truth and that it cannot be verbalized; it must be experienced. That's an interesting perspective indeed. It got me thinking on my way home... Today is the 20th of October of 2002.
example: 我去咗鄰近嘅精神二手書店，買咗一本關於冥想嘅好處嘅偽科學書；呢本書叫做赫伯特 · 本森嘅《放鬆反應》。我朋友 F 推薦咗佢。而家佢同我打算睇嘅其他書一齊放喺書架上面。嗰時只係 $ 3.00。嗰度嘅書店老闆係嚟自尼日利亞。佢個名係亞伯拉罕。佢係一個有趣嘅人，佢對靈性事務真係識得好多。我買咗本書之後，我哋傾咗幾分鐘。佢同我講，所有宗教都係某程度上「失敗」。佢宣布人唔需要任何嘢嘅「救恩」，好似基督教噉嘅「罪」，或者佛教嘅「苦難」。我問佢信唔信有不死嘅靈魂，呢個係佛教唔承認嘅事，因為佛教徒相信我哋係一條永無止境嘅「意識流」，而唔係真正嘅靈魂。佢話佢相信一個不死嘅靈魂。然後佢話只有一個真理，係唔可以用言語表達嘅；一定要經歷過。呢個確實係一個有趣嘅角度。呢件事令我喺返屋企嘅路上諗起 … … 今日係2002年10月20號。
exampleTranslation: I went to the neighborhood spiritual second-hand bookstore and bought a psuedo-scientific book about the benefits of meditation; it's called The Relaxation Response by Herbert Benson. My friend F recommended it. Now it's on the shelf along with some other books I intend to read. It was only $3.00. The bookstore owner there is from Nigeria. His name is Abraham. He's an interesting fellow who really knows a lot about spiritual affairs. After I bought the book, we talked for a few minutes. He told me that all religions "failed" in some way. He declared that one didn't need "salvation" from anything, like from "sin" as in Christianity, or like from "suffering" as in Buddhism. I asked him if he believed in an Immortal Soul, something that Buddhism does not acknowledge because Buddhists believe we are a never-ending "stream of consciousness," not really a soul. He said he believed in an Immortal Soul. Then he said that there is only One Truth and that it cannot be verbalized; it must be experienced. That's an interesting perspective indeed. It got me thinking on my way home... Today is the 20th of October of 2002.

word: 喺呢個跟進研究入面，塔克同佢嘅同事招募咗平均年齡大約75歲…
translation: In this follow-up study, Tucker and her colleagues recruited men whose average age was about 75 years old. Over a period of four years, the researchers used a bone scanner to make regular measurements of the men's hips, spines and forearms. Tucker also had the men keep detailed information about what they ate. In particular, she asked about vitamin C, because vitamin C seems to slow down bone resorption.
example: 喺呢個跟進研究入面，塔克同佢嘅同事招募咗平均年齡大約75歲嘅男性。研究人員喺四年嘅時間裏面，用骨掃描器定期測量男士嘅噼噼、脊椎同前臂。塔克亦都要啲男人保留埋佢哋食咗啲咩嘅詳細資料，特別係佢問咗維他命C，因為維他命C似乎會減慢骨骼嘅吸收。
exampleTranslation: In this follow-up study, Tucker and her colleagues recruited men whose average age was about 75 years old. Over a period of four years, the researchers used a bone scanner to make regular measurements of the men's hips, spines and forearms. Tucker also had the men keep detailed information about what they ate. In particular, she asked about vitamin C, because vitamin C seems to slow down bone resorption.

word: 正如之前所講，第三人容易喺古代對個人不死嘅渴望中忙碌，呢種…
translation: As has already been said, the Third Men were prone to phases of preoccupation with the ancient craving for personal immortality. This craving had often been strong among the First Men; and even the Second Men, in spite of their great gift of detachment, had sometimes allowed their admiration for human personality to persuade them that souls must live for ever. The short-lived and untheoretical Third Men, with their passion for living things of all kinds, and all the diversity of vital behaviour, conceived immortality in a variety of manners. In their final culture they imagined that at death all living things whom the Life God approved passed into another world, much like the familiar world, but happier. There they were said to live in the presence of the deity, serving him in untrammelled vital creativeness of sundry kinds.
example: 正如之前所講，第三人容易喺古代對個人不死嘅渴望中忙碌，呢種渴望喺第一人當中經常好強烈；甚至係第二人，儘管佢哋有好大嘅超然天賦，但係有時會令佢哋對人類個性嘅敬佩說服佢哋，靈魂必須永遠存在，而佢哋對所有生命嘅短命同非理論嘅行為，都係生命嘅。喺佢哋最後嘅文化入面，佢哋想像到所有被生命上帝批准嘅生物喺死亡嗰陣都會進入另一個世界，好似熟悉嘅世界噉，但係據講佢哋喺嗰度生活喺神面前，以各種無拘無束嘅生命創造力為佢服務。
exampleTranslation: As has already been said, the Third Men were prone to phases of preoccupation with the ancient craving for personal immortality. This craving had often been strong among the First Men; and even the Second Men, in spite of their great gift of detachment, had sometimes allowed their admiration for human personality to persuade them that souls must live for ever. The short-lived and untheoretical Third Men, with their passion for living things of all kinds, and all the diversity of vital behaviour, conceived immortality in a variety of manners. In their final culture they imagined that at death all living things whom the Life God approved passed into another world, much like the familiar world, but happier. There they were said to live in the presence of the deity, serving him in untrammelled vital creativeness of sundry kinds.

word: 有時喺我自己國家，我因為相信國際規範同多邊機構而被批評。但…
translation: Sometimes I'm criticized in my own country for professing a belief in international norms and multilateral institutions. But I am convinced that in the long run, giving up some freedom of action -- not giving up our ability to protect ourselves or pursue our core interests, but binding ourselves to international rules over the long term -- enhances our security. And I think that's not just true for us.
example: 有時喺我自己國家，我因為相信國際規範同多邊機構而被批評。但我堅信，長遠嚟講，放棄一部分行動自由——唔係放棄保護自己或追求核心利益嘅能力，而係長期將自己綁喺國際規則之上——其實會增強我哋嘅安全。我覺得呢個唔單止適用於我哋，對其他國家都一樣。
exampleTranslation: Sometimes I'm criticized in my own country for professing a belief in international norms and multilateral institutions. But I am convinced that in the long run, giving up some freedom of action -- not giving up our ability to protect ourselves or pursue our core interests, but binding ourselves to international rules over the long term -- enhances our security. And I think that's not just true for us.

After flights were grounded, however, she noticed that more of her coworkers were switching over to health care work, helping in non-medical functions at the hospital. Zainuddin opted to join them, becoming one of 500 aviation workers who made the switch under a state program to adapt work under the pandemic.

exampleTranslation: Hanim Zainuddin, for instance, usually spends her work hours donning a green sarong and crisscrossing the skies as a flight attendant. After flights were grounded, however, she noticed that more of her coworkers were switching over to health care work, helping in non-medical functions at the hospital. Zainuddin opted to join them, becoming one of 500 aviation workers who made the switch under a state program to adapt work under the pandemic.

word: 係2013年6月28號。喺網上，除咗 Interlingu…
translation: It is the 28th of June of 2013. On the Web, I have encountered other Latinate conlangs besides Interlingua. But because Interlingua was created by a very professional committee, I opine that Interlingua is the best of the Blues. Many would agree with me if they had the chance to peruse other brands. Interlingua was developed between 1937 and 1951 by the International Auxiliary Language Association (IALA), so it already has a long history.
example: 係2013年6月28號。喺網上，除咗 Interlingua 之外，我仲遇到過其他拉丁文嘅conlang。但因為Interlingua係由一個好專業嘅委員會創立，所以我認為Interlingua係藍調入面最好嘅。如果佢哋有機會睇吓其他品牌，好多人都會同意我嘅講法。Interlingua係由國際輔助語言協會（IALA）喺1937至1951年間發展出嚟，所以佢已經有好長嘅歷史。
exampleTranslation: It is the 28th of June of 2013. On the Web, I have encountered other Latinate conlangs besides Interlingua. But because Interlingua was created by a very professional committee, I opine that Interlingua is the best of the Blues. Many would agree with me if they had the chance to peruse other brands. Interlingua was developed between 1937 and 1951 by the International Auxiliary Language Association (IALA), so it already has a long history.

word: 親愛嘅母語人士，唔該幫我寫一啲描述一個確定世界嘅句子。世界…
translation: Dear native speakers. Please, assist me to compose an amount of sentences which describe a definite world. The world looks like this: 1. There is a red hard rough heavy box; 2. There is a green soft smooth light cube; 3. The box is bigger than the cube. Please, use the words from the list: Cube, green, soft, smooth, big, above, close, stand, fast, light, good; Box, red, hard, rough, small, under, far, move, slow, heavy, bad. Sentences can be of any length: from one word to 30 or more. Any suffix, prefix, conjunction, prepositions etc. can be used.
example: 親愛嘅母語人士，唔該幫我寫一啲描述一個確定世界嘅句子。世界係噉嘅：1.有個紅色嘅硬粗糙嘅重盒；2.有個綠色嘅軟光滑嘅光立方體；3.個盒大過個立方體，唔該，用清單入面嘅字：立方體，綠色，軟，光滑，大，上面，近，企，快，輕，好； 多啲。任何後綴、前綴、連接詞、介詞等都可以用。
exampleTranslation: Dear native speakers. Please, assist me to compose an amount of sentences which describe a definite world. The world looks like this: 1. There is a red hard rough heavy box; 2. There is a green soft smooth light cube; 3. The box is bigger than the cube. Please, use the words from the list: Cube, green, soft, smooth, big, above, close, stand, fast, light, good; Box, red, hard, rough, small, under, far, move, slow, heavy, bad. Sentences can be of any length: from one word to 30 or more. Any suffix, prefix, conjunction, prepositions etc. can be used.

Later, a handsome black-haired bearded man, maybe an Arab, approached the counter. He was wearing a black T-shirt and grey rugby pants. He had very hairy arms. Afterwards, I went to the pizzeria.

exampleTranslation: In the raining morning of the 30th of January of 2022, at the cafe, I was drinking my iced black tea. word: 當時係西班牙托雷莫利諾斯午夜後，我由酒店行出嚟，行落陡峭嘅…
translation: It was after midnight in Torremolinos in Spain, as I walked out of my hotel and walked down the steep incline towards the beach. On the way, I saw an intriguing green metal gate in front of a home, above which on marble, it said "Jardín de las Mercedes" or "Garden of the Mercies" of residence number 28. At the beach, it was dark and calm. There were "palapas" or palm-leaf shelters along the beach. The only other person that I saw that night looked like a Mexican, promenading.
example: 當時係西班牙托雷莫利諾斯午夜後，我由酒店行出嚟，行落陡峭嘅斜坡向海灘方向行。途中，我見到一間屋前面有個好有趣嘅綠色金屬閘，上面喺大理石上面寫住「梅賽德斯花園」或者「慈悲花園」，係住所28號。喺海灘，天黑而平靜。沿住海灘有「帕拉帕斯」或者棕櫚葉避難所。嗰晚我見到嘅唯一另一個人，個樣好似墨西哥人噉，喺度散步。
exampleTranslation: It was after midnight in Torremolinos in Spain, as I walked out of my hotel and walked down the steep incline towards the beach. On the way, I saw an intriguing green metal gate in front of a home, above which on marble, it said "Jardín de las Mercedes" or "Garden of the Mercies" of residence number 28. At the beach, it was dark and calm. There were "palapas" or palm-leaf shelters along the beach. The only other person that I saw that night looked like a Mexican, promenading.

word: 佢知道，行為「好靚仔」嘅韋蘭德先生已經睇中咗東三十九街一間…
translation: He knew that Mr. Welland, who was behaving "very handsomely," already had his eye on a newly built house in East Thirty-ninth Street. The neighbourhood was thought remote, and the house was built in a ghastly greenish-yellow stone that the younger architects were beginning to employ as a protest against the brownstone of which the uniform hue coated New York like a cold chocolate sauce; but the plumbing was perfect.
example: 佢知道，行為「好靚仔」嘅韋蘭德先生已經睇中咗東三十九街一間新建嘅屋。 人哋覺得呢個社區好偏遠，而間屋係用一塊可怕嘅綠黃色石頭起嘅，年輕嘅建築師開始用呢塊石頭嚟抗議啡色石頭，因為啡色石頭嘅統一色調好似冷朱古力醬咁覆蓋住紐約； 但係個水喉係完美嘅。
exampleTranslation: He knew that Mr. Welland, who was behaving "very handsomely," already had his eye on a newly built house in East Thirty-ninth Street. The neighbourhood was thought remote, and the house was built in a ghastly greenish-yellow stone that the younger architects were beginning to employ as a protest against the brownstone of which the uniform hue coated New York like a cold chocolate sauce; but the plumbing was perfect.

word: 為咗佢內心感到內疚，同佢得罪過嘅天堂和解，我哋唔會，亦唔敢…
translation: That she might internally feel compunction, and reconcile herself with Heaven, whom she had offended, we will not, and we dare not, deny; but to those around her she did not evince the slightest symptom either of repentance or remorse. In all external appearance she bore the same bold, haughty, unbending character which she had displayed before these unhappy events.
example: 為咗佢內心感到內疚，同佢得罪過嘅天堂和解，我哋唔會，亦唔敢否認；但對於身邊嘅人嚟講，佢無論係悔改定係悔恨，都冇表現出最細嘅症狀。喺所有外表上，佢都帶有同佢喺呢啲唔開心嘅事件之前所展現嘅大膽、傲慢、堅定嘅性格。
exampleTranslation: That she might internally feel compunction, and reconcile herself with Heaven, whom she had offended, we will not, and we dare not, deny; but to those around her she did not evince the slightest symptom either of repentance or remorse. In all external appearance she bore the same bold, haughty, unbending character which she had displayed before these unhappy events.

word: 經濟學喺人類事務入面扮演住重要嘅角色。有時，錢會控制人哋嘅…
translation: Economics play a large rôle in human affairs. Sometimes, money controls people's behaviour. An interesting speculative fiction movie is THX 1138. It is about the future in which credit flow and balances are carefully checked by a centralized computer. Everybody has a shaven head. Most wear white. The religion seems like a Buddhist-Catholic hybrid. The city is hygienic white and is subterranean. The huge city is like a clean hospital and a shopping mall. George Lucas, the filmmaker of THX 1138, also later made the more famous Star Wars. He has proclaimed his religion as Buddhist Methodist, according to Wikipedia.
example: 經濟學喺人類事務入面扮演住重要嘅角色。有時，錢會控制人哋嘅行為。一部有趣嘅投機小說電影係 THX 1138。呢個係關於未來，信貸流動同餘額會由一部集中式電腦仔細檢查。個個都剃光頭，大部分都係着白色。呢個城市係衛生嘅白色，而且係地下嘅。根據維基百科，佢已經宣布佢嘅宗教係佛教循道教。
exampleTranslation: Economics play a large rôle in human affairs. Sometimes, money controls people's behaviour. An interesting speculative fiction movie is THX 1138. It is about the future in which credit flow and balances are carefully checked by a centralized computer. Everybody has a shaven head. Most wear white. The religion seems like a Buddhist-Catholic hybrid. The city is hygienic white and is subterranean. The huge city is like a clean hospital and a shopping mall. George Lucas, the filmmaker of THX 1138, also later made the more famous Star Wars. He has proclaimed his religion as Buddhist Methodist, according to Wikipedia.

word: 同時，再次從鄰近嘅特內多斯， / 喺寧靜嘅月光嘅友好照顧之…
translation: Meanwhile from neighbouring Tenedos once more, / beneath the tranquil moonbeam's friendly care, / with ordered ships, along the deep sea-floor, / back came the Argive host, and sought the well-known shore. / Forth from the royal galley sprang the flame, / when Sinon, screened by partial Fate, withdrew / the bolts and barriers of the pinewood frame, / and from its inmost caverns, bared to view, / the fatal horse disgorged the Danaan crew.
example: 同時，再次從鄰近嘅特內多斯， / 喺寧靜嘅月光嘅友好照顧之下， / 有秩序嘅船隻，沿住深海嘅海底， / 返嚟嘅係阿吉夫嘅主人，並且尋求著名嘅海岸 / 從皇家廚房跳出嚟 火焰， / 當西諾，被部分命運篩選，撤回 / 松木框架嘅螺栓同障礙物， / 同埋從佢最入面嘅洞穴，裸露到景色， / 致命嘅馬吐出咗達南船員。
exampleTranslation: Meanwhile from neighbouring Tenedos once more, / beneath the tranquil moonbeam's friendly care, / with ordered ships, along the deep sea-floor, / back came the Argive host, and sought the well-known shore. / Forth from the royal galley sprang the flame, / when Sinon, screened by partial Fate, withdrew / the bolts and barriers of the pinewood frame, / and from its inmost caverns, bared to view, / the fatal horse disgorged the Danaan crew.

word: 喺黎明之前，我喺個隱蔽嘅社區嘅死胡同周圍行緊。我觀察緊黑暗…
translation: Before dawn, I was walking around and around the clandestine neighbourhood cul-de-sac. I was observing the dark sky with illumined clouds. The cul-de-sac is one of my other temples. In the sunny morning, I did see Marian my blonde British neighbour. She was dressed in green, as I was. She remarked how the air still felt cool. Her husband Martin is an Anglo with some German blood. Later, I greeted Sandra my Fijian neighbour, who is three-quarters Chinese and one-quarter East Indian. She was married to a Caribbean black, and has two hybrid children, Darius and Jewel. It's the 22nd of May of 2025.
example: 喺黎明之前，我喺個隱蔽嘅社區嘅死胡同周圍行緊。我觀察緊黑暗嘅天空，上面有照亮嘅雲死路一條係我其他寺廟之一。喺晴朗嘅朝早，我確實見到我個金髮英國鄰居瑪麗安。佢同我一樣，着住綠色嘅衫。佢話啲空氣仲覺得好凍。佢老公馬丁係英國人，有啲德國血統。後來，我同我嘅斐濟鄰居 Sandra 打招呼，佢係四分之三嘅中國人，四分一嘅東印度人。佢同一個加勒比黑人結婚，並且有兩個混血兒，大流士同珠寶。而家係2025年5月22號。
exampleTranslation: Before dawn, I was walking around and around the clandestine neighbourhood cul-de-sac. I was observing the dark sky with illumined clouds. The cul-de-sac is one of my other temples. In the sunny morning, I did see Marian my blonde British neighbour. She was dressed in green, as I was. She remarked how the air still felt cool. Her husband Martin is an Anglo with some German blood. Later, I greeted Sandra my Fijian neighbour, who is three-quarters Chinese and one-quarter East Indian. She was married to a Caribbean black, and has two hybrid children, Darius and Jewel. It's the 22nd of May of 2025.

word: 手指夠靈活先彈到琴。

example: 手指夠靈活先彈到琴。
